name: China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited
summary: China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a port operator in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, and internationally. It operates through Ports operation, Bonded Logistics Operation, and Other Operations. The company engages in the container, and bulk and general cargo terminals; and logistic park operation, ports transportation, and airport cargo handling activities. It also invests in and develops properties; constructs modular housings; trades in securities; and provides container terminal services, as well as computer network services. In addition, the company engages in port construction and development; operation of berths; operation of tugboats; and holding of various pieces of land. The company was formerly known as China Merchants Holdings (International) Company Limited and changed its name to China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited in June 2016. The company was founded in 1872 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited is considered as a Red Chip company due to its listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. China Merchants Port Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of China Merchants Group Limited.
